scripts.build:single: npx vite build && node -e "const fs=require('fs'); const p=require('path'); const out=p.join('server','public'); fs.mkdirSync(out,{recursive:true}); fs.readdirSync('dist').forEach(f=>{ const src=p.join('dist',f); const dest=p.join(out,f); fs.cpSync(src, dest, {recursive: true}); }); const srcAssets=p.join('src','assets'); const publicSrcAssets=p.join(out,'src','assets'); if(fs.existsSync(srcAssets)){ fs.mkdirSync(publicSrcAssets,{recursive:true}); fs.cpSync(srcAssets, publicSrcAssets, {recursive:true}); }"
